summary:
Bit2Go Virtual Card. A virtual prepaid card for global online payments that can be opened and used without submitting personal information (“No personal information required for card acquisition”). 

It supports Visa and Mastercard, offering instant virtual issuance, dynamic card numbers, and no 3-D Secure requirement. 

Base currencies are USD, HKD, and GBP. Funding is via direct top-ups with USDT on TRC20 or ERC20; other major coins (e.g., BTC, ETH, SOL) can be deposited into the Bit2Go Wallet and swapped to USDT before loading. 

Designed for cross-border e-commerce, subscriptions, and other online purchases; Apple Pay, Google Pay, and ATM cash-outs are not supported, so it is primarily for online use.
intro: Bit2Go (BIT2GO FINTECH LIMITED) claims to be registered as a MSB with FinCEN in the United States. Its website features a virtual card business page, highlighting dual-channel Visa/Mastercard, instant card issuance, no 3D Secure authentication required, multi-currency card denominated in USD/HKD/GBP, and enterprise-grade batch and risk management capabilities. The wallet currently allows direct deposits of USDT (TRC20 and ERC20), and claims the platform supports payments and exchange of major cryptocurrencies. The compliance module (AML/KYC/privacy) explicitly requires identity verification and compliance records. Because the official website does not disclose specific fees/limits, this information is provided as a placeholder. It is recommended to conduct field testing before launch or to obtain official card issuance terms and conditions before updating.

summary:
RedotPay is a licensed crypto Visa prepaid card issued by a financial institution in Hong Kong, designed to bridge the gap between digital assets and daily global spending. It supports deposits of various tokens, including USDT, BTC, and ETH, via major networks such as ERC20, TRC20, BEP20, and Solana. Users can choose between two card types: the Virtual Card with an application fee of 10.00 USD, or the Physical Card with an application fee of 100.00 USD.

The card features no monthly or annual maintenance fees. Primary transaction costs include a 1% conversion fee and a 1.2% FX fee for non-USD payments. For physical cardholders, ATM Withdrawal Fees are determined by the card's currency: the HKD card incurs a flat rate of 2.00%, while the USD card follows a tiered structure—2% for monthly withdrawals up to 10,000 USD and 3% for any amount exceeding that limit. After completing mandatory KYC verification, users can link their cards to Apple Pay, Google Pay, Alipay, and WeChat Pay for a seamless online and in-store payment experience worldwide.

summary_zh:
RedotPay 是一款由香港持牌金融机构发行的加密货币 Visa 预付卡，旨在连接数字资产与全球日常消费。用户可以通过 ERC20、TRC20、BEP20 及 Solana 等主流网络充值 USDT、BTC、ETH 等多种代币。该产品提供两种规格供用户选择：虚拟卡的申请费用为 10.00 USD，实体卡的申请费用为 100.00 USD。

在费用结构方面，该卡免收月费和年费，核心交易费用包含 1% 的转换费及 1.2% 的非美元货币转换费。针对实体卡用户，其 ATM 取现手续费依据卡片币种有所不同：HKD 卡统一按取现金额的 2.00% 收取；USD 卡则采取阶梯费率，每月取现额度在 10,000 USD 以内（含）收取 2%，超过 10,000 USD 的部分则收取 3%。用户在完成强制性的 KYC 实名认证后，即可将卡片绑定至 Apple Pay、Google Pay、支付宝及微信支付，实现加密货币在全球线上线下的无缝支付体验。

summary:
A U.S.-issued Mastercard credit card (issued by WebBank) that earns crypto on purchases. 

Everyday rewards include 4% back in crypto on gas, EV charging, transit, taxis, and rideshare (capped at $300 per month, then 1%), 3% on dining, 2% on groceries, and 1% on all other purchases. 

Rewards are deposited to your Gemini account instantly in most cases (occasional posting at settlement), and you can choose from 50+ supported assets and switch anytime. The card has no annual fee, no foreign transaction fees, supports Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay, and is available across all 50 U.S. states.
intro: Up to 4% crypto back (4% gas/EV/transit/rideshare capped at $300/month), 3% dining, 2% groceries, 1% other; no annual/FX fees; instant rewards; Apple/Google/Samsung Pay.

summary: The Coinbase One Card is a stainless-steel Amex credit card for U.S. Coinbase One members that earns 2–4% back in Bitcoin. It charges no annual or FX fees and supports Apple Pay and Google Pay, with Amex protections.
intro:
The Coinbase One Card marks Coinbase’s first foray into credit, in partnership with Cardless and the American Express network. 

Issued by First Electronic Bank, the 17-gram metal card is etched with the Bitcoin genesis block and ships with a virtual counterpart for immediate wallet use. Rewards start at 2 % and scale to 4 % Bitcoin back as customers hold more assets on Coinbase. 

Beyond crypto rewards, cardholders enjoy the full catalogue of Amex retail, travel and purchase benefits—plus repayment flexibility in either fiat or any Coinbase-held crypto. 

There are no annual or foreign-transaction fees, but maintaining an active Coinbase One membership is mandatory; if membership lapses, the card account can be closed. 

Applications open in fall 2025 with an early-access wait-list already live.

Public materials show a 5% top-up fee, 2% non-USD FX fee, a $0.30 per-transaction fee (plus 0.30% for Apple Pay), a $1 monthly fee, and a $10 issuance fee for Mastercard. 

Top-ups are marketed with SOL, while the Terms list USDT, USDC, and SOLC as supported cryptocurrencies. Unused balances can be withdrawn in USDT (minimum $10, 48-hour shortest interval). A $10,000/month top-up cap applies by default; higher limits require KYC.

The official Help Center documents fee granularity (transaction, Apple Pay add-on, issuance) and the USDT withdrawal process. Where site marketing and the Terms diverge (e.g., SOL vs USDT/USDC/SOLC top-ups), this record records all officially mentioned options and flags the nuance in Limits.

summary_zh: Nebeus 是一家位于巴塞罗那的综合性加密金融平台，在西班牙央行注册监管下运营。其 Mastercard 卡片仍是欧洲用户的首选，尤其是那些希望通过质押而非卖出加密货币来换取消费额度的用户。该生态系统提供完整的 IBAN 账户（欧元/英镑），并支持加密资产与传统法币之间的无缝转换，为加密原住民提供了一个强大的传统银行替代方案。

summary: The Fasset Card is a strategic expansion of the Fasset digital asset exchange, focusing on the Middle East and Southeast Asian corridors. The card allows users to top up their USD balance using USDT without any fees. Its integration with mobile wallets and its simple virtual-first issuance make it a reliable choice for users in emerging markets looking for a compliant way to access global payment networks.
intro: Financial freedom in your pocket. Fasset Card lets you spend your crypto anywhere Visa is accepted.
key_features_zh: ["稳定币-法币桥梁", "支持苹果钱包和谷歌钱包", "零充值费用", "区域性监管合规"]
summary_zh: Fasset Card 是 Fasset 数字资产交易所的战略扩展，专注于中东和东南亚市场。该卡允许用户使用 USDT 为其美元余额充值，且不收取任何手续费。其与移动钱包的集成以及简单的“虚拟卡优先”签发流程，使其成为新兴市场中寻求合规访问全球支付网络用户的可靠选择。

summary:
KazePay Card. KazePay offers prepaid Visa and Mastercard crypto debit cards that enable users to convert and spend major cryptocurrencies like BTC, ETH, USDT, and USDC as fiat at over 150 million merchants worldwide. 

It provides both virtual and physical cards, with zero transaction fees for spending, instant conversions, and support for Apple Pay and Google Pay. While virtual cards are currently available without KYC, full identity verification will be implemented soon. 

The platform emphasizes security with multi-factor authentication and wallet risk assessments, making it suitable for global crypto spending.
intro: KazePay Card is a non-KYC crypto debit card that allows instant spending of USDT, USDC, BTC, and ETH worldwide with zero transaction fees, supporting virtual and physical cards integrated with Apple Pay and Google Pay.
key_features_zh: ["实体卡与虚拟卡", "苹果支付 & 谷歌支付", "零交易手续费", "即时加密货币至法币转换", "全球210多国通用", "多张虚拟卡"]
summary_zh: KazePay提供预付Visa和万事达加密货币借记卡，使用户能够将BTC、ETH、USDT和USDC等主要加密货币转换并作为法币在全球1.5亿多商户处消费。它提供虚拟和物理卡，消费零交易费，即时转换，并支持Apple Pay和Google Pay。虽然虚拟卡目前无需KYC可用，但很快将实施完整身份验证。平台通过多因素认证和钱包风险评估强调安全性，适合全球加密货币消费。

limits: ["2% top-up fee for stablecoins", "Compatible with major mobile wallets and OpenAI/Midjourney payments"]

summary: Maxswap Card is a virtual-only solution designed for speed and online utility. It is frequently used by digital creators and freelancers to pay for global software subscriptions and services. By allowing users to top up directly with USDT/USDC, it bypasses traditional banking hurdles. The 0% FX fee makes it particularly attractive for non-USD transactions, although a 2% deposit fee applies to funding the card balance.
intro: Instant, virtual, and crypto-ready. Maxswap is your go-to card for global online payments.
key_features_zh: ["虚拟卡即时激活", "零外汇手续费", "原生支持稳定币", "隐私友好型支付工具"]
summary_zh: Maxswap Card 是一款专为速度和在线实用性设计的纯虚拟卡解决方案。数字创作者和自由职业者经常使用它来支付全球软件订阅和服务。通过允许用户直接使用 USDT/USDC 充值，它绕过了传统银行的障碍。0% 的外汇费使其在非美元交易中极具吸引力，尽管充值时会收取 2% 的手续费。

key_features: ["Solana Ecosystem Focused", "Instant Stablecoin Top-ups", "Global Visa Acceptance"]
summary: Pyra Card (by Pyra) targets the elite segment of the Solana community. It is known for its 'Extreme Limits,' allowing for daily spending of up to $1,000,000, making it suitable for major luxury purchases and business expenses. The card integrates seamlessly with Solana wallets, providing a fast off-ramp for USDC and SOL. While the FX fee is slightly higher at 2%, the sheer capacity and speed make it a niche powerhouse for the 'Solana whales'.
intro: Unlimited horizons on Solana. Pyra offers the highest spending limits for the Solana elite.
key_features_zh: ["专注 Solana 生态", "即时稳定币充值", "全球 Visa 认可度"]
summary_zh: Pyra Card (由 Pyra 提供) 针对 Solana 社区的精英阶层。它以“极致限额”闻名，每日消费限额高达 1,000,000 美元，非常适合大额奢侈品购买和商业开支。该卡与 Solana 钱包无缝集成，为 USDC 和 SOL 提供了快速的出金通道。虽然外汇费略高（2%），但其巨大的容量和速度使其成为“Solana 巨鲸”们的利基利器。

limits: ["Cashback cap €4,800/month", "Borrow up to 10% LTV"]
key_features: ["Virtual Card", "Apple & Google Pay", "Up to 2% Cashback", "No FX Fees", "Contactless ATM"]
summary:
1inch Card. The 1inch Card is a prepaid Mastercard debit powered by Crypto Life/Baanx that lets you spend crypto online, in-store, or through Apple Pay and Google Pay, and withdraw cash at contactless ATMs. 

Top up with popular assets such as 1INCH, BTC, USDT, ETH, and BXX; balances auto-convert to EUR or GBP at checkout with 0% FX mark-up (≈ 2% crypto-to-fiat fee). 

Every purchase earns monthly-paid cashback: 2% in BXX or 1% in BTC or USDT (up to €4,800 per month). 

KYC is mandatory, and a virtual card is issued instantly; a limited-edition physical design is planned. Daily spend is capped at €8,000, and you can borrow fiat at 0% interest against crypto (≤ 10% LTV).
key_features_zh: ["虚拟卡", "苹果支付&谷歌支付", "最高2%返现", "免外汇手续费", "无接触ATM取款"]
summary_zh: 1inch卡是一种预付万事达借记卡，由Crypto Life/Baanx提供支持，让您可以在网上、店内、通过Apple Pay和Google Pay消费加密货币，并在非接触式ATM上取现。支持1INCH、BTC、USDT、ETH和BXX等流行资产充值；余额在结账时自动转换为欧元或英镑，0%外汇加价（约2%的加密货币到法币费用）。每笔消费均可获得月付现金返还：2%的BXX或1%的BTC或USDT（每月最高4,800欧元）。需要KYC，虚拟卡即时发行；计划推出限量版物理设计。每日消费上限为8,000欧元，可以以0%利息借入法币对抗加密货币（LTV≤10%）。

limits: ["Standard cards topup once after creation", "Premium cards reloadable indefinitely", "Designed for online use", "In-person use via Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal", "Unlimited number of cards", "High monthly topup limit per card"]

summary:
Bitsika Card. Bitsika offers virtual Visa debit cards that are prepaid and reloadable, funded with cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and USDT without requiring KYC. Cards are issued instantly and can be used globally for online shopping, subscriptions, and in-person via digital wallets. 

Features include high spending limits, unlimited card creation, robust security, and compatibility with Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. No cashback is provided.
intro: Bitsika Virtual Card is a no-KYC crypto-funded Visa debit card for global online and wallet-based payments, with instant issuance and high limits.
key_features_zh: ["无需KYC", "实体卡与虚拟卡", "苹果支付、谷歌支付与PayPal", "即时发卡", "加密货币充值（BTC/USDT ERC20/BEP20）", "全球受理", "隐私与安全控制"]
summary_zh: Bitsika提供虚拟Visa借记卡，预付且可充值，使用比特币和USDT等加密货币资助，无需KYC。卡即时发行，可通过数字钱包在全球用于在线购物、订阅和店内支付。功能包括高消费限额、无限制卡创建、强大安全性，以及与Apple Pay、Google Pay和PayPal的兼容性。不提供返现。

limits: ["Free ATM withdrawals up to $200/month", "Daily spending limit up to $5,000"]
key_features: ["Non-custodial MPC Security", "No FX Fees", "Up to 8% Crypto Cashback", "50% Discount on Subscriptions", "Up to 20% APY"]
summary:
Coca Card is a non-custodial Visa debit card integrated with a multi-party computation (MPC) secured wallet, eliminating the need for traditional seed phrases. It is a stablecoin-native solution that offers a "Zero Fee Guarantee," featuring 0% FX markups, no monthly maintenance fees, and zero-fee swaps across 15+ blockchains. 

Users can earn between 1% and 8% cashback on everyday purchases and up to 50% cashback on popular digital subscriptions like ChatGPT, Netflix, and Spotify. While the wallet app is accessible globally, the Visa card requires KYC and is currently available in over 50 countries across the EEA, UK, APAC, and LATAM. It supports mobile payments via Apple Pay and Google Pay through a partnership with Curve.
intro: The first non-custodial MPC wallet with a built-in Visa card. Spend your crypto with zero fees and earn up to 8% cashback globally.
key_features_zh: ["非托管 MPC 安全技术", "无外汇手续费", "高达 8% 加密货币返现", "订阅服务 50% 折扣", "年收益率最高达 20%"]
summary_zh:
Coca Card 是一款与非托管 MPC 钱包集成的 Visa 借记卡，采用了多方计算（MPC）技术，彻底消除了传统的助记词风险。该卡以“零费率”为核心卖点，提供 0% 的外汇加价、无月费、无年费，并支持 15 条以上公链资产的免手续费兑换。

在奖励方面，用户可享受 1% 至 8% 的消费返现，并针对 ChatGPT、Netflix 和 Spotify 等主流订阅服务提供高达 50% 的返现奖励。虽然 Coca 钱包应用可全球下载，但申请 Visa 卡需通过 KYC 认证，目前主要面向欧洲经济区 (EEA)、英国、亚太及拉美等 50 多个国家开放。通过与 Curve 合作，该卡可完美支持 Apple Pay 和 Google Pay 移动支付。

summary: SafePal Card, in partnership with a Swiss-licensed bank, offers a highly secure way to bridge hardware wallet assets with real-world spending. It is a leading choice for security-conscious users who already use the SafePal ecosystem. The card requires the opening of a digital bank account through the app, providing users with their own IBAN/account number. It allows for direct top-ups from the SafePal wallet, making the path from cold storage to merchant payment safer and more direct than ever.
intro: The secure bridge for your cold storage. SafePal Card brings Swiss banking standards to your hardware wallet.
key_features_zh: ["硬件钱包深度集成", "瑞士银行级安全", "SFP 生态奖励", "多链资产支持"]
summary_zh: SafePal Card 与瑞士持牌银行合作，提供了一种高度安全的方式，将硬件钱包资产与现实世界消费相结合。它是已经在使用 SafePal 生态系统且注重安全的用户首选。该卡要求通过 App 开立数字银行账户，为用户提供自己的 IBAN/账号。它允许从 SafePal 钱包直接充值，使冷钱包到商户支付的路径比以往任何时候都更加安全和直接。

limits: ["1% Saveback rewards capped at €15/month", "ATM withdrawals free above €100", "Mirror card issuance fee is €50 one-time"]
key_features: ["1% Saveback on Spending", "Interest on Uninvested Cash", "Real-time Trading Integration", "Mirror & Classic Card Designs", "No Monthly Subscription Fees"]
summary: Trade Republic is a major European neo-broker that has evolved into a full-service digital bank. Its Visa debit card, widely available, is highly competitive due to its 1% 'Saveback' feature, which automatically invests rewards into a chosen savings plan. The card offers exceptional value for travelers by charging zero foreign exchange fees and providing unlimited free ATM withdrawals for amounts over €100. Additionally, users earn high interest on their uninvested cash balance, making it a dual-purpose tool for both daily spending and wealth building.virtual card (free),classic card (5 € one-time payment) and mirror card (50 € one-time payment)
intro: The card that pays you to spend. Earn 1% Saveback and high interest on your cash with the Trade Republic Visa.
key_features_zh: ["消费即享 1% Saveback 投资奖励", "未投资现金享受高额利息", "实时交易与投资集成", "提供 Mirror(镜面) 及经典款卡面", "无月度订阅费"]
summary_zh: Trade Republic 是欧洲领先的数字券商，现已演变为全方位数字银行。其 Visa 借记卡极具竞争力，核心特色是 1% 的“Saveback”功能，可将消费奖励自动投入选定的储蓄计划。对于旅行者而言，该卡极具价值：它不收取任何外汇交易费，且金额超过 100 欧元的 ATM 取现完全免费。此外，账户内的闲置现金还可获得高额利息，是日常消费与财富增值的双重利器。虚拟卡免费，经典卡5欧元，镜面卡50欧元

key_features: ["Self-Custody Integration", "Seamless Peer-to-Peer Transfer", "Virtual & Physical Availability", "Zero Monthly Fees"]
summary: Onboard Card is a sleek financial tool designed for the modern crypto user who prioritizes self-sovereignty. It is widely recognized for its seamless integration with the Onboard self-custody wallet, allowing users to easily bridge their on-chain assets to the Visa network. With a focus on removing friction, the card offers zero top-up fees and instant virtual card issuance. It caters to a global audience, providing a reliable way to use stablecoins for daily purchases, subscriptions like ChatGPT, and mobile payments via Google and Apple Pay without ever losing control of their private keys.
intro: The bridge to self-sovereign spending. Onboard Card lets you spend your crypto instantly while maintaining full control of your assets.
key_features_zh: ["自托管钱包集成", "无缝的点对点转账", "虚拟卡与实体卡支持", "零月费"]
summary_zh: Onboard Card 是一款为注重自主权的现代加密货币用户设计的时尚金融工具。它因与 Onboard 自托管钱包的无缝集成而广受认可，允许用户轻松地将链上资产桥接到 Mastercard 网络。该卡专注于消除阻碍，提供零充值手续费和即时虚拟卡签发。它面向全球用户，提供了一种可靠的方式来使用稳定币进行日常购物、ChatGPT 等订阅服务，以及通过 Google 和 Apple Pay 进行移动支付，且用户始终掌控自己的私钥。

key_features: ["Generous Cashback", "Zero FX Fees", "High Spending Capacity", "Asian Digital Wallet Integration"]
summary: Kolo Card is a rewards-focused payment solution that combines high limits with aggressive cashback tiers. Its 0% FX fee makes it a top choice for international travelers and global digital spenders. With the ability to earn up to 5% back on purchases, Kolo provides a high-value bridge for crypto assets, particularly on the Arbitrum and Ethereum networks, with broad acceptance across major mobile wallets.
intro: High rewards, zero fees. Kolo Card offers up to 5% cashback and 0% FX fees for global spending.
key_features_zh: ["优渥的返现比例", "零外汇手续费", "超高消费能力", "集成亚洲数字钱包"]
summary_zh: Kolo Card 是一款注重奖励的支付解决方案，将高限额与激进的阶梯返现相结合。卡片的无外汇费使其成为国际旅行者和全球数字消费者的顶级选择。凭借最高 5% 的返现，Kolo 为加密资产（特别是 Arbitrum 和以太坊网络）提供了一个高价值的桥梁，并广泛兼容各大主流移动钱包。

limits: ["Product variants: International Reloadable (REL, open beta; not available in the United States) and Non-Reloadable (NR) virtual cards for US, Canada, and International.", "Usage terms for NR: virtual and non-reloadable; US NR spends USD with US merchants; CAD NR spends CAD with Canadian merchants; International NR can be spent worldwide.", "Fees by variant: International NR has a single 3.8% purchase fee and no currency exchange fee; REL shows 6.8% initial load and 6.8% reload in the official short-form disclosure.", "FX policy: International REL passes through a 2% FX fee when spending non-USD; International NR lists no currency exchange fee.", "Compliance caps: $1,000 maximum load per card at any time; $1,000 spending limit per day; $4,000 monthly spending limit (REL).", "ATM withdrawals are not supported (N/A).", "Reported degraded acceptance for NR in France, Portugal, Finland, and Italy.", "Mobile wallets: NR fully supports Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay."]
key_features: ["Non-KYC", "Instant Virtual Visa", "Apple & Google Pay", "Stablecoin Top-Ups (USDC/USDT/DAI)", "Solana & EVM Support", "Defined Spending Caps "]
summary:
Laso Finance Card. Laso Finance provides a no-KYC crypto prepaid Visa with instant virtual issuance. The lineup includes International Reloadable (open beta, not available in the U.S.) and Non-Reloadable virtual cards for the U.S., Canada, and International regions. 

The International Non-Reloadable card advertises a 3.8% purchase fee and no FX fee, while the official short-form disclosure lists 6.8% for the initial load and 6.8% for reloads (applicable to reloadable products). Compliance materials indicate a $1,000 maximum load, $1,000 daily spend cap, and $4,000 monthly spend cap (REL). ATM withdrawals are not supported. 

Supported funding assets include stablecoins (USDC, USDT, DAI), and cards can be added to Apple Pay and Google Pay.
intro: No-KYC virtual Visa cards with instant issuance, Apple/Google Pay support, stablecoin funding, and clear spend caps across NR and REL variants.
key_features_zh: ["无需KYC", "即时虚拟Visa卡", "苹果支付 & 谷歌支付", "稳定币充值（USDC/USDT/DAI）", "支持Solana与EVM网络", "可设定支出上限"]
summary_zh: Laso Finance提供无需KYC的加密货币预付Visa卡，即时虚拟发行。产品线包括国际可充值（公开测试版，美国不可用）和美国、加拿大及国际地区的不可充值虚拟卡。国际不可充值卡广告宣传3.8%购买费和无外汇费，而官方简短披露列出初始充值6.8%和充值6.8%（适用于可充值产品）。合规材料显示最高充值1,000美元，每日消费上限1,000美元，月消费上限4,000美元（REL）。不支持ATM取现。支持的资助资产包括稳定币（USDC、USDT、DAI），卡可添加到Apple Pay和Google Pay。

key_features: ["Mantle Network Native", "Web3 On-chain Banking", "Multi-Chain USDC Deposits", "Direct Bank Transfers (Off-ramp)"]
summary: UR Card is a borderless 'smart money' app built on the Mantle Network, functioning as an on-chain bank. It bridges Web3 and traditional finance by offering a virtual Mastercard card and a direct IBAN for fiat payouts. It is one of the first apps to support emerging assets like Monad (MONAD) alongside standard USDC. The card is optimized for users who need to convert crypto to multiple fiat currencies (USD, HKD, EUR) instantly and spend via NFC-enabled mobile wallets.
intro: The on-chain bank in your pocket. Spend, save, and off-ramp your crypto seamlessly with UR Card.
key_features_zh: ["Mantle 网络原生支持", "Web3 链上银行体验", "多链 USDC 充值", "直接银行转账 (出金)"]
summary_zh: UR Card 是一款基于 Mantle 网络构建的无国界“智能货币”应用，其功能类似于链上银行。它通过提供虚拟 Mastercard 卡和直接用于法币支付的 IBAN，连接了 Web3 和传统金融。它是首批支持 Monad (MONAD) 等新兴资产及标准 USDC 的应用之一。该卡专为需要将加密货币即时转换为多种法币（美元、港币、欧元）并通过支持 NFC 的移动钱包消费的用户而优化。

limits: ["Pre-order fee of $70 for high-quality metal card", "Direct USDC spending on Base L2"]
key_features: ["Base L2 Native Spending", "Yield-Bearing Balance (sUSD)", "On-chain Rewards Program"]
summary: Based Card (from based.one) is specifically designed for the Base Layer 2 ecosystem. It differentiates itself by allowing users to earn yield on their idle card balance through integration with sUSD (linked to synthetic T-bill rates of ~4%). The card focuses on capital efficiency, allowing users to spend USDC directly on-chain without traditional off-ramping friction. While the initial pre-order fee is relatively high ($70) and annual fee($30), the card offers a premium metal build and deep integration with Base ecosystem rewards.
intro: The native card for Base. Spend USDC, earn yield, and get rewarded on the fastest-growing L2.
key_features_zh: ["Base L2 原生消费", "余额生息功能 (sUSD)", "链上奖励计划", "提供金属实体卡"]
summary_zh: Based Card (来自 based.one) 专为 Base Layer 2 生态系统设计。它通过集成 sUSD（挂钩合成美债利率，约 4%），允许用户在闲置卡片余额上赚取收益，从而实现差异化。该卡专注于资本效率，允许用户直接在链上消费 USDC，而无需传统的出金流程。虽然初始预订费较高（70 美元）和年费（30美元），但该卡提供优质的金属材质，并与 Base 生态奖励深度集成。

key_features: ["Million Dollar Daily Limit", "Stablecoin-First Settlement", "Mobile Wallet Native", "Low 1% FX Fee"]
summary: Kem Card focuses on providing institutional-grade spending power to individual users. It is recognized for its massive $1,000,000 daily limit, catering to high-net-worth crypto holders. The card is virtual-only and settles primarily in stablecoins, offering a streamlined path from digital assets to global merchant acceptance. Its 1% FX fee is among the more competitive in the high-limit segment.

summary:
Offramp Card is a self-custodial crypto Visa debit card designed for the web3 era. It allows users to top up their card balance directly from any self-custodial wallet (like MetaMask or Phantom) using USDC/USDT across multiple networks including Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, and Base. The platform offers instant virtual cards for online spending and physical cards for global ATM withdrawals. 

Key advantages include $0 issuance fees for the first virtual card and no monthly or annual maintenance fees. It charges a 1.5% FX fee for non-USD transactions and a 2% fee for ATM withdrawals. Users must complete a standard Sumsub KYC process before using the card. Once verified, it can be seamlessly added to Apple Pay and Google Pay for contactless payments at over 150 million merchants worldwide.
intro: The ultimate Visa card for crypto natives. Offramp is a global account powered by stablecoins, allowing anyone to deposit crypto and instantly spend with a U.S.-issued Visa card.

在费用方面，首张虚拟卡申请免费，且无月费或年费。主要费用包括 1.5% 的外汇手续费（非美元消费）和 2% 的 ATM 取现费。用户需通过 Sumsub 完成实名认证（KYC）后即可激活。激活后的卡片可绑定至 Apple Pay、Google Pay，在全球超过 1.5 亿家商户进行无缝支付。

intro:
"Gate Card is the flagship crypto debit product from Gate.io.

Available across most of the European Economic Area, it comes in both instant-issue virtual form and optional plastic for a modest €10. 
 
The card sits on the Visa network, so it is accepted by more than 80 million merchants worldwide and can be added to Google Pay at launch. 
 
 Funding is flexible—over 2 000 cryptocurrencies can be topped-up or spent directly. 
 
 Rewards are simple but attractive: 1 % base crypto-back paid in USDT, BTC, ETH or GT, doubled to 2 % for the new users 30 days, with separate in-house travel offers returning up to 7 % on hotel bookings. 
 
 Fees are lean: no annual charge, 0 % ATM withdrawals on the first €200 per month (1 % thereafter) and a forex spread as low as 0.2 % when spending non-EUR inside EEA. 
 
 Hard caps include a €25 000 daily and €50 000 monthly spending limit. 
 
 KYC is mandatory, and service is currently limited to EEA residents."

intro:
"Cryptopay’s Visa debit programme converts popular cryptocurrencies into spendable EUR or GBP at point-of-sale.

Users can generate a virtual card instantly in the mobile app or order a sleek black plastic card for €5. 
 
Funds are secured in segregated e-money accounts issued by DiPocket UAB (Bank of Lithuania-regulated). 
 
Cardholders may load up to €10 000 daily, spend up to €35 000 per purchase and withdraw €1 500 cash a day at ATMs worldwide. 
 
Core costs include 1 % top-up fee, €2.0 domestic ATM fee and a 1.95 % foreign-currency surcharge; there is no annual fee or inactivity fee. 
 
The card supports more than forty digital assets (BTC, ETH, USDT, XRP, DOGE and others) but currently offers no cashback or staking rewards. 
 
Apple Pay and Google Pay tokenisation are not yet available, and the product is restricted to KYC-verified residents of the European Economic Area."
